events.title: Temporary stationery display near the bookstore aisle entrance
factStatements: A temporary stationery and notebook display is set near the quiet bookstore aisle entrance.
Weekend browsing traffic is slightly denser around the entrance shelves than on an ordinary weekday.

stateFacts: The aisle now has a temporary display edge with extra notebook stacks and binder clips near the entrance.

objectAvailabilityChanges.label: binder clip tray
stateFacts: A small tray of binder clips is plausibly visible near the temporary display.

ambientShifts: There is a little more shelf-side hesitation and browsing drift than usual.
hardConstraints: Do not force the temporary display into the protagonist's moment unless she truly notices or touches it.
Treat the extra traffic as background world state, not as a required interaction.
events.notesZh: 可通过上游手动维护，仅改变世界状态与可用事实，不直接指定发帖内容。

events.title: Fresh noticeboard refresh near the after-class corridor
factStatements: A noticeboard refresh near the after-class corridor leaves a few newly pinned paper edges in view.

stateFacts: The stairwell landing now has a nearby noticeboard with freshly pinned paper edges.

ambientShifts: The corridor carries a mild just-updated school routine feeling.
hardConstraints: Do not turn the noticeboard itself into a symbolic poster shot.
events.notesZh: 示例事件：把学校走廊的更新视作世界事实，而不是强制题材。
